case_title: DIANA GUTIERREZ VS. SOUP FREAKS INCORPORATED A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, DIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUP FREAKS INCORPORATED A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $17,613.31 PRINCIPAL, $58.55 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,041.86, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
